arts.ttl: Europa League | Porto 1-1 Roma: Match Report
arts.sum: In a thrilling Europa League play-off first leg, Roma managed to hold FC Porto to a 1-1 draw at the Estádio do Dragão. The match was a tale of two halves, with Roma initially in control but forced to defend desperately in the closing stages. arts.sum: Ajax won 2-0 at Union Saint-Gilloise, with 16-year-old Jorthy Mokio netting his side’s second goal. Fenerbahce dominated to beat Anderlecht 3-0 and take a comprehensive lead to Belgium for the second leg next week.

arts.sum: Updates from knockout phase playoff first legs Live scoreboard | Read the latest Football Daily Ajax lead in Belgium. A fine, end-to-end move was finished off beautifully by Christian Rasmussen, who clipped a first-time shot into the far corner from 19 yards. It’s all going swimmingly for Jose Mourinho. Youssef En-Nesyri has put Fenerbahce 3-0 ahead with a mighty header from Sebastian Szymanski’s cross. He was about 15 yards out and powered it into the bottom corner at the near post.
